title: Insert Mermaid Diagram
shortDesc: Side-by-side editor with instant preview, syntax highlighting, and templates.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Insert Mermaid Diagram
longDesc: Opens a full-featured side-by-side editor with live preview. Write or paste Mermaid syntax on the left, see the rendered diagram update in real time on the right. Choose from built-in templates to jump-start any diagram type.

title: Edit All Mermaid Diagrams
shortDesc: Browse every diagram in your document, expand any card to edit its source inline with a live preview, and save changes in place.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Edit All Mermaid Diagrams
longDesc: Lists every Mermaid diagram in your document as a card with a thumbnail preview. Expand any card to reveal an inline editor with a live preview panel — edit the Mermaid source on the left, see the rendered diagram update in real time on the right. Save & Replace writes the updated diagram back to the document without leaving the dialog.

title: Edit Selected Mermaid Diagram
shortDesc: Click any diagram and edit its source in place — no copy-paste needed.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Edit Selected Mermaid Diagram
longDesc: Click on any Mermaid diagram that was inserted by this add-on, then run this command. The editor opens pre-loaded with the diagram's source code so you can tweak and re-render without starting over.

title: Convert All Code to Diagrams
shortDesc: Scans your entire document for Mermaid code blocks and renders them all as high-quality diagrams without leaving docs. No manual work.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert All Code to Diagrams
longDesc: Scans your entire Google Doc™ for Mermaid code blocks — both native Code Snippet elements and fenced ```mermaid blocks — and renders every one as a high-quality diagram. You preview each diagram before choosing to Insert (after the code) or Replace (swap the code block).

title: Convert Selected Code to Diagram
shortDesc: Select a single code block or fenced Mermaid block and convert just that one. Useful when you want to render one diagram without scanning the whole document.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert Selected Code to Diagram
longDesc: Select a single code block or fenced Mermaid block and convert just that one. Useful when you want to render one diagram without scanning the whole document.

title: Convert All Diagrams to Code
shortDesc: Extract the original Mermaid source from every diagram in the document without leaving docs.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert All Diagrams to Code
longDesc: Every diagram inserted by this add-on embeds the original Mermaid source in its alt text. This command scans the entire document and replaces every diagram with a fenced mermaid code block containing the original source.

title: Convert Selected Diagram to Code
shortDesc: Click a single diagram and extract its original Mermaid source back into a code block.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Convert Selected Diagram to Code
longDesc: Click on any Mermaid diagram that was inserted by this add-on, then run this command. The diagram is replaced with a fenced mermaid code block containing the original source — ready to edit, share, or convert back to a diagram.

title: Markdown Import & Export
shortDesc: Import markdown with Mermaid blocks into your doc, or export your entire document back to markdown with diagram source intact.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Import from Markdown
longDesc: Paste raw markdown into the import dialog. The add-on parses it, renders any Mermaid code blocks as diagrams, and inserts the formatted content into your Google Doc™ — including headings, lists, tables, inline code, and native checkboxes.

title: Export as Markdown
shortDesc: Convert your Google Docs™ content back to markdown, with Mermaid source automatically extracted from diagram alt text.
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Export as Markdown
longDesc: Converts your entire Google Doc™ to markdown. Headings, lists, tables, and formatting are preserved. Mermaid diagrams are automatically converted back to fenced code blocks by extracting the source from the image's alt text.

title: Fix Native "Copy as Markdown"
shortDesc: Google Docs™' native "Copy as Markdown" mangles Mermaid syntax. This tool repairs vertical tabs, stray backticks, and broken formatting so your diagrams render correctly. Learn more →
menu: Extensions → Mermaid Toolkit → Fix Native "Copy as Markdown"
longDesc: The one feature you didn't know you needed — until Google Docs™ breaks your diagrams. Paste your corrupted code into the tool. It automatically: (1) Replaces all \v (vertical tab) characters with proper newlines, (2) Strips stray backtick fences that wrapped individual lines, (3) Removes invisible formatting artifacts, (4) Shows a side-by-side diff so you can see exactly what changed. Copy the fixed result and paste it back into your doc — it's now valid Mermaid syntax, ready to render.

title: Templates & Gallery
shortDesc: Jump-start with flowcharts, sequences, ER diagrams, C4, and 20+ more types. Browse gallery →

title: Zero Data Collection
shortDesc: No analytics. No cookies. No telemetry. No servers. Your documents never leave your browser — rendering is 100% client-side via Mermaid.js. The only external request is loading the library from jsDelivr.
